title: Lesson 32
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: a large area covered with trees
words.example: The forest is quiet in the early morning.

words.meaning: the right or ability to do what you choose
words.example: Students have the freedom to choose one club.
Their friendship began in elementary school.

words.meaning: a large road for fast travel between places
words.example: The highway was busy during the holiday.

words.meaning: a day or period when people do not work or go to school
words.example: We visited our grandparents during the holiday.

words.meaning: a place where sick or injured people receive care
words.example: The hospital is next to the station.

words.meaning: businesses that make or sell a certain type of product or service
words.example: The tourist industry creates many jobs.

words.meaning: a tool or a device used to make music
words.example: The guitar is her favorite instrument.

words.meaning: a person whose job is to help people with the law
words.example: The lawyer explained the contract clearly.

words.meaning: a regular publication with articles and pictures
words.example: I read a travel magazine on the train.
